An authenticated user with workflow edit access could configure a `Respond to Webhook` node to serve binary content with an attacker-controlled `Content-Type`. The binary response path bypassed the central `Content-Security-Policy` sandbox header, allowing a public webhook to execute JavaScript in the n8n origin when visited by an authenticated user, with access to that user's session.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.55, 2.25.7, and 2.26.2. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Limit workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Disable the Respond to Webhook node by adding `n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook` to the `NODES_EXCLUDE` environment variable.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00216, "percentile": 0.11993}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T19:00:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54301"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-23T17:17:06Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T19:00:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-54301", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Same-Origin XSS in Respond to Webhook Node", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T13:43:55Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v733-mwr6-fgcm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.55", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.55"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Same-Origin XSS in Respond to Webhook Node
